title: HMZ Autonomous Responder Config Schema
description: Configuration schema for the HMZ Autonomous Responder. All defaults are set to disabled/safe. No combination of these settings should enable live autonomous sends without explicit owner approval.

autonomous_enabled.description: Master switch. Must be false in shadow mode and all non-pilot modes. Set to true only with owner approval (Gate 2).

shadow_only.description: If true, evaluations are logged but no sends occur. Must be true in Mode 0 and Mode 1.

dry_run.description: If true, no real sends are made regardless of other settings. Must be true until Mode 2 owner approval.

owner_approval_required.description: If true, each autonomous send requires owner pre-approval toggle. Recommended for initial pilot.

emergency_disabled.description: Kill switch. If true, all autonomous processing is halted immediately.

reviewer_timezone.description: IANA timezone for working-hours evaluation. All working hours are evaluated in this timezone.

working_days.description: Days of the week on which autonomous sends are permitted.

working_hours_start.description: Start of working hours in HH:MM format (reviewer_timezone).

working_hours_end.description: End of working hours in HH:MM format (reviewer_timezone).

prospect_timezone_strategy.description: How to handle prospect timezone. reviewer_only: only reviewer TZ matters. prospect_business_hours: also require prospect to be in business hours. intersection: require both.

blackout_dates.description: List of YYYY-MM-DD dates on which no autonomous sends are permitted (e.g. public holidays).

holiday_calendar_placeholder.description: Placeholder for future integration with a holiday calendar API. Currently informational only.

campaign_allowlist.description: Campaign IDs explicitly approved for autonomous sends. Empty = no campaigns approved. Must contain at least one entry for any autonomous send to occur.

sender_allowlist.description: Sender email addresses explicitly approved for autonomous sends. Empty = no senders approved.

intent_allowlist.description: Primary intent types eligible for autonomous send. Empty = no intents approved. Recommended initial values: INFORMATION_REQUEST, SCHEDULING_REQUEST.

micro_intent_allowlist.description: Micro intent types eligible for autonomous send. If empty, any micro intent within an allowed primary intent is eligible (subject to other gates).

additional_intent_blocklist.description: Additional intent types that block autonomous send even if primary intent is allowed. This is an addition to the hardcoded permanent block list.

risk_blocklist.description: Risk flag values that block autonomous send.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum classification confidence score required for autonomous eligibility. Must be >= 0.85 for initial pilot.

max_autonomous_sends_per_day.description: Maximum total autonomous sends per day. 0 = none allowed. Must remain 0 until Mode 2 approval.

max_autonomous_sends_per_campaign_per_da.description: Maximum autonomous sends per campaign per day.

max_autonomous_sends_per_sender_per_day.description: Maximum autonomous sends per sender per day.

require_post_action_review.description: If true, every autonomous action (including shadow evaluations) is queued for owner review.

digest_frequency.description: How often to generate the autonomous activity digest.

escalation_channels.description: List of notification channels (email addresses, Slack webhooks, etc.) for escalation alerts.

rollback_mode.description: How rollback is triggered. manual = owner must explicitly trigger. auto_on_threshold = automatically disable if error rate exceeds threshold (future).

live_pilot_daily_cap.description: Maximum autonomous sends per day during controlled pilot (Mode 2). Applies only when autonomous_enabled=true. Start at 1.

live_pilot_requires_owner_toggle.description: If true, each individual autonomous send requires owner to toggle approval before processing. Recommended for initial pilot.
